title: APP NOT SHOWING DUTIES
message: If the app is not showing the duties and it shows a blank page. It should work clearing cache. go to settings in your android, then apps, then find duties, storage and clear cache. DON'T CLEAR DATA! Try again, and if it doesnt' work. at the bottom of the duties there is a report button which will contact me straight through whatsapp. If I know what is wrong in detail, I can help. Thank you
